title: storage — retention windows
description: Retention policy per entity + per file kind. PurgeExpiredFilesJob runs nightly + walks archived files past their kind's window. Tenant erasure cascades independent of retention (immediate hard-delete via the CascadeStorageErasure listener).

hot.description: Active files (deleted_at IS NULL AND archived_at IS NULL) live indefinitely, capped only by the tenant's storage.bytes.consumed entitlement.

warm.description: Soft-deleted files (deleted_at set) stay in the hot table for 30 days by default. Recoverable via tenant admin `restore` action within the window.

cold.description: Archived files (archived_at set via #[Attachable(on_replace: 'archive')] OR user action) live per the kind's retention_days setting. Default: 90 days for most kinds; per-kind overrides in data/kinds.json.

purge.action: Hard-delete row + decrement blob refcount + emit FileErased with erasure_reason=retention_purge OR archived_expired.

hot.description: Variants live for the lifetime of their parent File. Never independently expired.
Every issued signed URL row. High-volume table.

purge.action: Hard-delete rows where issued_at < NOW() - 90 days. Batched at 10k rows/run.

retention.note: The 90-day minimum satisfies GDPR Art. 30 (records of processing) + SOC 2 CC6.8. Extended retention available per config('storage.audit_retention_days') for regulated tenants (business + enterprise tiers can extend to 365 days).

hot.description: In-flight or recently-terminated uploads. TTL applied at initiate.

warm.description: Aborted / expired ChunkedUploads (state IN aborted / expired) retained for state inspection during retro.

purge.action: Hard-delete + clean up any leftover provider multipart parts (S3 abortMultipartUpload) + release quota reservation if lingering.

avatar.note: Old avatars archived on replace; purged 30d later.

document.note: Documents kept indefinitely unless the user or tenant admin deletes explicitly.

invitation_attachment.note: Invitations expire in 90d typically; attachments follow.

newsletter_hero.note: Newsletter hero images retained one year for issue-history preservation.

export_artifact.note: DSAR / transfer export ZIPs auto-purged after 30 days.

backup.note: Platform-level snapshots retained 90 days for disaster recovery.

receipt.note: 7 years for tax + accounting compliance (business + enterprise tenants).

tenant_override.description: Business + enterprise tenants can override the per-kind retention_days via the storage.custom_retention feature flag. Overrides never SHORTEN below the compliance-mandated minimums (e.g. receipt cannot be less than 2555 days for tax-jurisdiction tenants).
